goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 17:00' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'departure time', and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should serve 'spanish' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:00 and should leave on wednesday
The train should go to london liverpool street and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get price, departure time, and train ID
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should be in the centre
The restaurant should serve spanish food
